<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="block_check_distance">block_check_distance</variable><variable type="Number" id="drop_force">drop_force</variable><variable type="String" id="nbtVehicleGear">nbtVehicleGear</variable><variable type="String" id="nbtFuel">nbtFuel</variable><variable type="String" id="tagVehicleSolidBlocks">tagVehicleSolidBlocks</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="-903" y="-1014"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:drop_force</field><comment pinned="false" h="65" w="436">This make the entity have a better time staying on the ground when traveling at fast speeds, higher numbers will push the entity down to the ground but also make the entity fall faster when driving off steep cliffs.</comment><value name="VAL"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field><comment pinned="false" h="64" w="186">do not use negative numbers any number above 0 will add downward force.</comment></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:block_check_distance</field><comment pinned="false" h="65" w="464">this will set the distance from the bottom of the entity to check for blocks that count as "solid" blocks it can rest on. It is adivsed that you use 0.0625 or one pixel below the entity so that the entity will not sink through the ground.</comment><value name="VAL"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.0625</field><comment pinned="false" h="32" w="164">Default valuse is 0.0625
0.0625</comment></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:nbtFuel</field><comment pinned="false" h="33" w="247">The name of your FUEL NBT variable.</comment><value name="VAL"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Fuel</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="TEXT">forge:vehicles/solid_blocks</field></block></value><next><block type="controls_if"><comment pinned="false" h="51" w="285">This will force the car to stop when the entity has no fuel or is
